biocontainers.name: biocontainers
biocontainers.description: Search BioContainers, inspect bioinformatics container metadata, list available versions, and resolve full quay.io image tags through the GA4GH TRS API.

zenodo.name: zenodo
zenodo.description: Search and download Zenodo records, and manage authenticated Zenodo deposits through the API, including drafts, metadata, files, deletion, and publishing.

bio-reproducer.name: bio-reproducer
bio-reproducer.description: Guide agents through reproducible bioinformatics paper reproduction using a logged multi-phase workspace, async long-running tasks, staged reports, data manifests, Nextflow orchestration, and validation.

paperutils.name: paperutils
paperutils.description: Run paperutils CLI commands (get, find, explain) to fetch paper dossiers, search for papers, or explain dataset accessions for biomedical and CS papers. Use when the user asks about papers, DOIs, PMIDs, arXiv IDs, datasets, or accessions — anything that requires querying Crossref, Europe PMC, PubMed, arXiv, bioRxiv, ENA, or NCBI.

quay.name: quay
quay.description: Search Quay.io repositories, list image tags, inspect tag metadata, and resolve pullable quay.io image references for public or token-visible containers.

image-mirror-skill.name: image-mirror-skill
image-mirror-skill.description: Use the mip CLI to accelerate and troubleshoot Docker/OCI image pulls with registry-aware mirror rewrite, probe, pull, and configuration workflows.

remote-exec.name: remote-exec
remote-exec.description: Use this skill when the user needs to run repeated shell commands on a remote machine over SSH, including connection checks, stdin scripts, and optional tmux-backed persistent state. Do not use it for local-only commands or workflows that require storing passwords.

mineru-api.name: mineru-api
mineru-api.description: Parse PDF documents via a remote MinerU API server using a CLI wrapper that mirrors the `mineru` interface. Covers single-file and batch PDF parsing, async submission, and health checks. Use when the user wants to extract markdown, tables, and formulas from PDFs through an existing MinerU deployment.

pdffigures2.name: pdffigures2
pdffigures2.description: Extract figures, tables, and captions from scholarly PDFs using PDFFigures 2.0 (Allen AI). Use this skill when the user needs to extract visual elements (figures, charts, tables) from a PDF — especially academic papers — and wants structured metadata plus rendered PNG images.

make-skill.name: make-skill
make-skill.description: Create or revise Agent Skills repositories with one or more skills under skills/, precise SKILL.md frontmatter, concise instructions, validation checks, and skit-friendly metadata.

search-skills.name: search-skills
search-skills.description: Find, evaluate, and install agent skills with the skit CLI. Use when the user asks to find a skill, search installable skills, add a capability, install a skill, list installed skills, update skills, remove skills, or check active links.
